gigapan.description:
Sadly the sign is washed out, but diretly across the street is the Huntry Coyote Restaurant, 1070 Wien Burggasse 4

Rose and I have eaten here twice, and loved it bothtimes.  Roast Pork, Goulash, a massive bowl of fresh fried potato chips.

When they brought Rose's goulash they asked her in German if she 'would like a little beer with that?'  The idea of beerless goulash semed inconceivable to them...
